title: Those in Office during the Year
description: `Abdallah b. al-Zubayr led the pilgrimage this year. His governor in charge of the garrison cities of al-Kufah and al-Basrah this year was his brother Mus`ab b. al-Zubayr. Shurayh [b. al-Harith alKind!] was in charge of the judiciary of al-Kufah. Hisham b. Hubayrah was in charge of the judiciary of al-Basrah. `Abdallah b. Khazim was in charge of Khurasan.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
